Interactive website portfolio

Seven mini-sites, built like actual client directions.

Each card opens into a longer, scrollable website concept with a distinct art direction, real sections, motion systems, SVG drawing, and selective scroll-synced WebGL.

Scroll-driven 3DFull inner sitesWorker-ready

Quality bar

Not copied from Hermes Dashboard — just the same discipline: restrained shell, precise controls, real hierarchy, and effects that earn their place.
